text: I'd like to uh say that we consider this a great privilege to be doing this work and uh hope that we are going to question the direction that will be of value to the readers of this material this session. I thought that possibly inspecting the effect on the rays of different well-known figures in our history might be of help in understanding how the catalyst of the illusion creates spiritual growth. I was making a list here in the first, I thought we might possibly hit the half points on as to the effect of catalyst of the individual's work and life, would be uh the one we know as Franklin D. Roosevelt. Could you say something about that thing? I am wrong. It is to be noted that in discussing those who are well known among your peoples. There is the possibility that information may be seen to be specific to one entity, whereas in actuality the great design of experience is much the same for each entity. It is with this in mind that we would discuss the experiential forces which offered catalyst to an individual. Much distortion may have taken place in regard to misinformation and misinterpretation of an entity's thoughts or behaviors. We shall now proceed to shall we say speak of the basic parameters of the one known as a Franklin when any entity comes into third density incarnation. Each of its energy centers is potentiated, but must be activated by the self using experience. The one known as Franklin developed very quickly up through a red, orange, a yellow, and a green, and began to work in the a blue ray energy center at a tender age, as you would say. This rapid growth was due, firstly, to previous achievements in the activation of these rays, secondly, to the relative comfort and leisure of its early existence. Thirdly, due to the strong desire upon the part of the entity to progress this entity a mated with an entity whose a blue array of vibrations were of a strength more than equal to its own, thus acquiring catalyst for a further growth in that area that was to persist throughout the incarnation of this entity had some difficulty with continued green array activity due to the excessive energy which was put into the activities regarding other selves in the distortion towards acquiring power. This was to have its toll upon the physical vehicle, as you may call it, the limitation of the non-movement of a portion of the physical vehicle opened once again for this entity, the opportunity for concentration upon the more, shall we say, universal or idealistic aspects of power. That is the non-abusive use of power. Thus, at the outset of a bellicose action, this entity had lost some positive polarity due to excessive use of the orange and yellow array energies at the expense of a green and blue ray energies. Then had a regain of the polarity due to the catalytic effects of a painful limitation upon the physical complex. This entity was not of a abelicose nature, but rather during the conflict continued to vibrate in a green ray working with the blue ray energies. The entity who was the one known as a Franklin's a teacher, also functioned greatly during this period as a blue ray activator not only for its mate, but also in a amour, a universal expression of this entity, a polarized continuously in a positive fashion, in the universal sense, while in a less universal sense, developing a pattern of what may be called karma. This karma having to do with inharmonious relationship distortions with the mate teacher.

segment.segment: I'd like to uh say that we consider this a great privilege to be doing this work and uh hope that we are going to question the direction that will be of value to the readers of this material this session.
I thought that possibly inspecting the effect on the rays of different well-known figures in our history might be of help in understanding how the catalyst of the illusion creates spiritual growth.
I was making a list here in the first, I thought we might possibly hit the half points on as to the effect of catalyst of the individual's work and life, would be uh the one we know as Franklin D.
Roosevelt.
Could you say something about that thing?
I am wrong.
It is to be noted that in discussing those who are well known among your peoples.
There is the possibility that information may be seen to be specific to one entity, whereas in actuality the great design of experience is much the same for each entity.
It is with this in mind that we would discuss the experiential forces which offered catalyst to an individual.
Much distortion may have taken place in regard to misinformation and misinterpretation of an entity's thoughts or behaviors.
We shall now proceed to shall we say speak of the basic parameters of the one known as a Franklin when any entity comes into third density incarnation.
Each of its energy centers is potentiated, but must be activated by the self using experience.
The one known as Franklin developed very quickly up through a red, orange, a yellow, and a green, and began to work in the a blue ray energy center at a tender age, as you would say.
This rapid growth was due, firstly, to previous achievements in the activation of these rays, secondly, to the relative comfort and leisure of its early existence.

Thirdly, due to the strong desire upon the part of the entity to progress this entity a mated with an entity whose a blue array of vibrations were of a strength more than equal to its own, thus acquiring catalyst for a further growth in that area that was to persist throughout the incarnation of this entity had some difficulty with continued green array activity due to the excessive energy which was put into the activities regarding other selves in the distortion towards acquiring power.

This was to have its toll upon the physical vehicle, as you may call it, the limitation of the non-movement of a portion of the physical vehicle opened once again for this entity, the opportunity for concentration upon the more, shall we say, universal or idealistic aspects of power.
That is the non-abusive use of power.
Thus, at the outset of a bellicose action, this entity had lost some positive polarity due to excessive use of the orange and yellow array energies at the expense of a green and blue ray energies.
Then had a regain of the polarity due to the catalytic effects of a painful limitation upon the physical complex.
This entity was not of a abelicose nature, but rather during the conflict continued to vibrate in a green ray working with the blue ray energies.

The entity who was the one known as a Franklin's a teacher, also functioned greatly during this period as a blue ray activator not only for its mate, but also in a amour, a universal expression of this entity, a polarized continuously in a positive fashion, in the universal sense, while in a less universal sense, developing a pattern of what may be called karma.
This karma having to do with inharmonious relationship distortions with the mate teacher.
